tag-editcheck-newcontent-description: EditCheck wuxuu u arkaa in wax cusub lagu daray bogga
tag-editcheck-references-description: EditCheck waxa uu u malaynayaa in tixraac loo baahnaa
tag-editcheck-references-activated-descr: EditCheck wuxuu u arkaa in tixraac loo baahnaa, waxaana la muujiyay is-dhexgalka
tag-visualeditor-description: Wax ka-beddel lagu sameeyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo [[{{MediaWiki:visualeditor-descriptionpagelink}}|tifaftiraha muuqaalka]]
tag-visualeditor-needcheck-description: Tafatir lagu sameeyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo [[{{MediaWiki:visualeditor-descriptionpagelink}}|tifaftiraha muuqaalka]] halkaas oo nidaamku ogaaday in wikitext-ku uu yeelan karo isbeddello aan la doonayn.
tag-visualeditor-wikitext-description: Tafatir lagu sameeyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo tifaftiraha wikitext ee 2017
tag-visualeditor-switched-description: Isticmaaluhu wuxuu ku bilaabay tafatirka tifaftiraha muuqaalka, ka dibna wuxuu u beddelay tifaftiraha wikitext.
visualeditor-feedback-tool: Ka bixi faallo ku saabsan software-kan
visualeditor-welcomedialog-content: Qof kasta wuu ka qayb qaadan karaa, habayn kasta waa kaalmo.
visualeditor-welcomedialog-content-thank: Waad ku mahadsantahay kaalmada aad adduunyada ku caawisay helitaan dheeraad ah!
visualeditor-welcomedialog-switch-ve: Ku bedel wax bedelaha la arki karo
